project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with App Router
build_system: npm with Next.js build system, drizzle-orm for DB
test_framework: vitest with tests/unit/ directory, mocking db and auth
verification_instructions: 1. npx tsc --noEmit (0 errors), 2. npx vitest run (all pass), 3. npm run build (production build succeeds)
contribution_requirements: Every page needs loading.tsx + error.tsx. API routes use requireAuth + apiError pattern. Schema uses utils.pk(), utils.tenantId(), utils.audit(). Module-gated routes call requireModule().
key_patterns: API routes: try/catch with requireAuth + apiError. Schema: pgTable with utils factories. Components: server page.tsx fetches data, passes to *-client.tsx client component. Tests: vitest describe/it with mocked db. Sentry: instrumentation.ts catches all unhandled errors via onRequestError, global-error.tsx catches client-side. Error boundaries use error.tsx per route segment.
directory_structure: app/ (pages + API routes), components/ (UI), lib/ (core logic), drizzle/ (schema + migrations), tests/ (unit/integration/e2e)
